hooks.command: [[ "$PWD" == *.claude/worktrees/* ]] && jq -n --arg pwd "$PWD" '{systemMessage: ("⚠ WORKTREE SESSION: " + $pwd + "\n\nPer memory rule feedback_no_branches.md — DO NOT make file changes in this worktree. ALL operations must target /Volumes/Samsung500/goreadling-production/saraandeva/ (the main repo on main branch). The worktree is auto-created by Claude Desktop and is a harness artifact; changes inside it do NOT persist on main. Use absolute paths in every file/git operation.")}' || true
